name: Math Calculators
description: Free math calculators for percentages, fractions, statistics, algebra, and geometry. Step-by-step solutions.
metaDescription: Calculate percentages, fractions, standard deviation, quadratic equations, and more. Free math calculators with step-by-step solutions.

subcategories.name: Basic Math
subcategories.description: Calculate any percentage, add and subtract fractions step by step, simplify ratios, and find the GCF and LCM of any numbers. Free basic math tools.
